sentence: 她去拍了一套个人写真。
pinyin: Tā qù pāi le yī tào gèrén xiězhēn.
english: She went to have a personal portrait photo set taken.

sentence: 我照着食谱做了一道新菜。
pinyin: Wǒ zhào zhe shípǔ zuò le yī dào xīn cài.
english: I followed a recipe and cooked a new dish.

sentence: 考古学家挖到了一块古代头骨。
pinyin: Kǎogǔ xuéjiā wā dào le yī kuài gǔdài tóugǔ.

sentence: 这位女星凭这部电影获了奖。
pinyin: Zhè wèi nǚxīng píng zhè bù diànyǐng huò le jiǎng.
english: This actress won an award for this film.

sentence: 那家工厂因为缺料而停产了。
pinyin: Nà jiā gōngchǎng yīnwèi quē liào ér tíngchǎn le.
english: That factory halted production because of a material shortage.
